revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''先宮神社'''（さきのみやじんじゃ）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == 伝承により境内前の小川...'
revision.text:
'''先宮神社'''（さきのみやじんじゃ）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == 伝承により境内前の小川に橋を架けないという特色を持つ神社である。[[諏訪地域]]の他の神社と同様、拝殿の四隅に[[御柱]]が建っている。 ==祭神== 高光姫命（たかてるひめのみこと）[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ] == 所在地 == [[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和3丁目18番1号 == アクセス == JR[[上諏訪駅]]から北へ約1km。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ] {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さきのみやしんしや}} [[Category:長野県の神社]] [[Category:諏訪市]]

revision.text:
'''先宮神社'''（さきのみやじんじゃ）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == 伝承により境内前の小川に橋を架けないという特色を持つ神社である。[[諏訪地域]]の他の神社と同様、拝殿の四隅に[[御柱]]が建っている。 ==祭神== 高光姫命（たかてるひめのみこと）[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ] == 所在地 == [[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和3丁目18番1号 == アクセス == JR[[上諏訪駅]]から北へ約1km。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ] {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さきのみやしんしや}} [[Category:長野県の神社]] [[Category:諏訪市の歴史]]

'''先宮神社'''（さきのみやじんじゃ）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == 伝承により境内前の小川に橋を架けないという特色を持つ神社である。[[諏訪地域]]の他の神社と同様、拝殿の四隅に[[御柱]]が建っている。 博麗神社の元ネタという説もある。 ==祭神== 高光姫命（たかてるひめのみこと）[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ] == 所在地 == [[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和3丁目18番1号 == アクセス == JR[[上諏訪駅]]から北へ約1km。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ] {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さきのみやしんしや}} [[Category:長野県の神社]] [[Category:諏訪市の歴史]] [[Category:諏訪信仰]] [[Category:諏訪市の建築物]]

{{神社 |名称=先宮神社 |別名=鷺宮明神、新海宮社 |画像=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
先宮神社鳥居 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |所在地=長野県諏訪市大和3-18-1 |位置={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |祭神=[[高光姫命]]
[[建比良鳥命|稲背脛命]]（一説） |社格=[[諏訪大社]]上社摂社 |例祭=9月29日（現在はその近くの日曜日）}} '''先宮神社'''（さきのみやじんじゃ）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == 諏訪に建御名方命（諏訪大社御祭神）が入ってきたとき、諏訪にいた大和族と争いになった。大和族は敗れてこの大和の地から出ないことを約束して、境内前の小川に橋を架けないという伝説を持つ神社である。[[諏訪地域]]の他の神社と同様、拝殿の四隅に[[御柱]]が建っている。 ==祭神== 高光姫命（たかてるひめのみこと）[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ] == 所在地 == [[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和3丁目18番1号 == アクセス == JR[[上諏訪駅]]から北へ約1キロメートル。 == 関連項目 == *[[諏訪市#神社|諏訪市の神社]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}}

{{神社 |名称=先宮神社 |別名=鷺宮明神、新海宮社 |画像=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
先宮神社鳥居 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |所在地=長野県諏訪市大和3-18-1 |位置={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |祭神=[[高光姫命]]
[[建比良鳥命|稲背脛命]]（一説） |社格=[[諏訪大社]]上社摂社 |例祭=9月29日（現在はその近くの日曜日）}} '''先宮神社'''（さきのみやじんじゃ）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|建物と先ノ宮神社のケヤキ（諏訪市指定[[天然記念物]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html 文化財係 - 諏訪市] 関連ファイル文化財一覧表参照） ]] 諏訪に[[建御名方命]]（[[諏訪大社]]御[[祭神]]）が入ってきたとき、諏訪にいた大和族と争いになった。大和族は敗れてこの大和の地から出ないことを約束して、境内前の小川に橋を架けないという伝説を持つ神社である。[[諏訪地域]]の他の神社と同様、拝殿の四隅に[[御柱]]が建っている。 [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|右端は[[手水]]舎]] ==祭神== 高光姫命（たかてるひめのみこと）[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == 所在地 == [[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和3丁目18番1号 == アクセス == JR[[上諏訪駅]]から北へ約1キロメートル。 == 関連項目 == *[[諏訪市#神社|諏訪市の神社]] *[[諏訪信仰]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|[[太田亮]]『諏訪神社誌』第1巻1926年 （大正15年）]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{諏訪信仰}} {{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さきのみやしんしや}} [[Category:長野県の神社]] [[Category:諏訪市の歴史]] [[Category:諏訪信仰]] [[Category:諏訪市の建築物]]

{{神社 |名称=Sakinomiya Shrine |別名=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine |画像=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |所在地=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |位置={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |祭神={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |社格={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |例祭=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata no Mikoto|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == Location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sakinomiya Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Suwa Faith]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[Category:Original pages]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:original pages]] [[ja:先宮神社]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[en:Sakimiya Shrine]]

{{神社 |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine |image=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |address=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata no Mikoto|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == Location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sakinomiya Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Suwa Faith]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[Category:Original pages]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:original pages]] [[ja:先宮神社]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[en:Sakimiya Shrine]]

{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata no Mikoto|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == Location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}

[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}

{{神社 |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine |image=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}

{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sakinomiya Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:先宮神社]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[en:Sakimiya Shrine]]

{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}

Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}

{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. {{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}

revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sakinomiya Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:先宮神社]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 1]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[en:Sakimiya Shrine]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sakinomiya Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[ja:先宮神社]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[en:Sakimiya Shrine]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]]

Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sakinomiya Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[ja:先宮神社]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[en:Sakimiya Shrine]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}{{Normdaten}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[ja:先宮神社]] [[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]] [[en:Sakimiya Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sakinomiya Shrine}}

[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=draft}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅|12=draft}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|12=draft}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=draft}} == References == {{Reflist}}

{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|12=draft}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha|12=draft}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市|12=draft}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|12=draft}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|12=draft}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha|12=draft}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|12=draft}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱|12=draft}} poles. revision.comment: 14 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:先宮神社 up to rev 102339866
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=先宮神社 |別名=鷺宮明神、新海宮社 |画像=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
先宮神社鳥居 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |所在地=長野県諏訪市大和3-18-1 |位置={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |祭神=[[高光姫命]]
[[建比良鳥命|稲背脛命]]（一説） |社格=[[諏訪大社]]上社摂社 |例祭=9月29日（現在はその近くの日曜日）}} '''先宮神社'''（さきのみやじんじゃ）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|建物と先ノ宮神社のケヤキ（諏訪市指定[[天然記念物]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html 文化財係 - 諏訪市] 関連ファイル文化財一覧表参照） ]] 諏訪に[[建御名方命]]（[[諏訪大社]]御[[祭神]]）が入ってきたとき、諏訪にいた大和族と争いになった。大和族は敗れてこの大和の地から出ないことを約束して、境内前の小川に橋を架けないという伝説を持つ神社である。[[諏訪地域]]の他の神社と同様、拝殿の四隅に[[御柱]]が建っている。 [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|右端は[[手水]]舎]] ==祭神== 高光姫命（たかてるひめのみこと）[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == 所在地 == [[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和3丁目18番1号 == アクセス == JR[[上諏訪駅]]から北へ約1キロメートル。 == 関連項目 == *[[諏訪市#神社|諏訪市の神社]] *[[諏訪信仰]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|[[太田亮]]『諏訪神社誌』第1巻1926年 （大正15年）]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{諏訪信仰}} {{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さきのみやしんしや}} [[Category:長野県の神社]] [[Category:諏訪市の歴史]] [[Category:諏訪信仰]] [[Category:諏訪市の建築物]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=先宮神社 |別名=鷺宮明神、新海宮社 |画像=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
先宮神社鳥居 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |所在地=長野県諏訪市大和3-18-1 |位置={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |祭神=[[高光姫命]]
[[建比良鳥命|稲背脛命]]（一説） |社格=[[諏訪大社]]上社摂社 |例祭=9月29日（現在はその近くの日曜日）}} '''先宮神社'''（さきのみやじんじゃ）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|建物と先ノ宮神社のケヤキ（諏訪市指定[[天然記念物]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html 文化財係 - 諏訪市] 関連ファイル文化財一覧表参照） ]] 諏訪に[[建御名方命]]（[[諏訪大社]]御[[祭神]]）が入ってきたとき、諏訪にいた大和族と争いになった。大和族は敗れてこの大和の地から出ないことを約束して、境内前の小川に橋を架けないという伝説を持つ神社である。[[諏訪地域]]の他の神社と同様、拝殿の四隅に[[御柱]]が建っている。 [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|右端は[[手水]]舎]] ==祭神== 高光姫命（たかてるひめのみこと）[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} == 所在地 == [[長野県]][[諏訪市]]大和3丁目18番1号 == アクセス == JR[[上諏訪駅]]から北へ約1キロメートル。 == 関連項目 == *[[諏訪市#神社|諏訪市の神社]] *[[諏訪信仰]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ 先宮神社 - トップページ]{{リンク切れ|date=2024年10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|[[太田亮]]『諏訪神社誌』第1巻1926年 （大正15年）]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{諏訪信仰}} {{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さきのみやしんしや}} [[Category:長野県の神社]] [[Category:諏訪市の歴史]] [[Category:諏訪信仰]] [[Category:諏訪市の建築物]]

revision.comment: Bot: restore translated version
revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg|280px]]
Sakinomiya Shrine Torii {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280|coord={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E}}}} |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{coord|36|03|18|N|138|07|03|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (according to some traditions) |type={{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|qq=draft|qq=draft}}[https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社|1=Suwa-taisha|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱|qq=draft|qq=draft}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}{{Normdaten}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Sakimiya Shrine]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:先宮神社]] [[sn:Sakimiya Shrine]] [[en:Sakimiya Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sakinomiya Shrine}} {{translated page|ja|先宮神社|version=102339866|comment=Imported full ja history}}

After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱|qq=draft|qq=draft}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kamisuwa Station|ja|上諏訪駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{Reflist}}

{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inasehagi no Mikoto|qq=}} (according to some traditions) |type=[[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]] Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City [[:en:Natural monument|Natural Monument]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata|qq=}}, the deity enshrined at [[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]]. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onbashira|qq=}} poles. {{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inasehagi no Mikoto|qq=}} (according to some traditions) |type=[[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]] Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)}} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City [[:en:Natural monument|Natural Monument]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata|qq=}}, the deity enshrined at [[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]]. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|ja|御柱|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onbashira|qq=}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|qq=}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR [[:en:Kami-Suwa Station|Kamisuwa Station]]. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of shrines in Suwa City|qq=}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|qq=}} == References == {{Reflist}}

[[ja:先宮神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11388136]] Wikidata name: Sakinomiya Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{Coord|36.055|N|138.1175|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inasehagi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493042}} (according to some traditions) |type=[[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]] Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)|prefecture={{ill|Suwa|WD=Q846338}} }} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City [[:en:Natural monument|Natural Monument]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ}}, the deity enshrined at [[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]]. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with [[:en:Onbashira|Onbashira]] poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR [[:en:Kami-Suwa Station|Kamisuwa Station]]. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of shrines in Suwa City|qq=|1=Suwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q846338}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryō Ōta|qq=|1=Akira Ōta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13099367}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|先宮神社|version=102339866|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[ja:先宮神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa]] [[Category:History of Suwa]] {{wikidata link|Q11388136}}

[[ja:先宮神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11388136]] Wikidata name: Sakinomiya Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{Coord|36.055|N|138.1175|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493042}} (according to some traditions) |type=[[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]] Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)|prefecture={{ill|Suwa|WD=Q846338}} }} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City [[:en:Natural monument|Natural Monument]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ}}, the deity enshrined at [[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]]. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with [[:en:Onbashira|Onbashira]] poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR [[:en:Kami-Suwa Station|Kamisuwa Station]]. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of shrines in Suwa City|1=Suwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q846338}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryō Ōta|1=Akira Ōta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13099367}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|先宮神社|version=102339866|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[ja:先宮神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa]] [[Category:History of Suwa]] {{wikidata link|Q11388136}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

revision.text:
[[ja:先宮神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11388136]] Wikidata name: Sakinomiya Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{Coord|36.055|N|138.1175|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493042}} (according to some traditions) |type=[[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]] Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)|prefecture={{ill|Suwa|WD=Q846338}} }} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City [[:en:Natural monument|Natural Monument]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ}}, the deity enshrined at [[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]]. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with [[:en:Onbashira|Onbashira]] poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR [[:en:Kami-Suwa Station|Kamisuwa Station]]. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of shrines in Suwa City|1=Suwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q846338}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryō Ōta|1=Akira Ōta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13099367}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|先宮神社|version=102339866|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[ja:先宮神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa]] [[Category:History of Suwa]] {{wikidata link|Q11388136}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[ja:先宮神社]] [[ja:先宮神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11388136]] Wikidata name: Sakinomiya Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Sakinomiya Shrine |alternative names=Sagimiya Myojin, Shinkaimiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 04.jpg |location=Nagano Prefecture, Suwa City, Daimon 3-18-1 |coordinates={{Coord|36.055|N|138.1175|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity={{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493042}} (according to some traditions) |type=[[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]] Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)|prefecture={{ill|Suwa|WD=Q846338}} }} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City [[:en:Natural monument|Natural Monument]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ}}, the deity enshrined at [[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]]. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with [[:en:Onbashira|Onbashira]] poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR [[:en:Kami-Suwa Station|Kamisuwa Station]]. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of shrines in Suwa City|1=Suwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q846338}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryō Ōta|1=Akira Ōta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13099367}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|先宮神社|version=102339866|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[ja:先宮神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa]] [[Category:History of Suwa]] {{wikidata link|Q11388136}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with [[:en:Onbashira|Onbashira]] poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR [[:en:Kami-Suwa Station|Kamisuwa Station]]. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of shrines in Suwa City|1=Suwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q846338}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}} == References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} [[File:NDL983470 諏訪神社誌 第1巻 part1.pdf|thumb|180px|right|{{ill|Ryō Ōta|ja|太田亮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryō Ōta|1=Akira Ōta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13099367}}'s "Suwa Shrine Records," Volume 1, 1926 (Taisho 15)]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|先宮神社|version=102339866|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:先宮神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11388136}} [[Category:Buildings in Suwa]] [[Category:Buildings in Suwa City]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:History of Suwa]] [[Category:History of Suwa City]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

{{ill|Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja|稲背脛命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inasehagi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493042}} (according to some traditions) |type=[[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]] Kamisha Subordinate Shrine |Festival=September 29 (or the nearest Sunday)|prefecture={{ill|Suwa|WD=Q846338}} }} '''Sakinomiya Shrine''' (さきのみやじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Overview == [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 03.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Shrine Building and the Keyaki Tree (designated as a Suwa City [[:en:Natural monument|Natural Monument]][https://www.city.suwa.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/2152.html Cultural Property Division - Suwa City] See related file "List of Cultural Properties.") ]] The shrine is associated with a legend involving {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ}}, the deity enshrined at [[:en:Suwa-taisha|Suwa-taisha]]. When Takeminakata arrived in Suwa, a conflict ensued with the local Yamato clan. After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with [[:en:Onbashira|Onbashira]] poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR [[:en:Kami-Suwa Station|Kamisuwa Station]]. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of shrines in Suwa City|1=Suwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q846338}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}} == References == {{Reflist}}

After their defeat, the Yamato clan promised not to leave the Daimon area and vowed not to build a bridge over the small stream in front of the shrine. Like other shrines in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=}}, the corners of the worship hall (haiden) are adorned with {{ill|Onbashira|en|Onbashira|WD=Q3698846|lt=Onbashira|1=Onbashira}} poles. [[File:先宮神社 - Sakinomiya Shrine 01.jpg|thumb|180px|right|The Chozuya on the right]] == Deities == The main deity enshrined is {{ill|Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja|高光姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takateruhime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.[http://www.8tree.com/sakinomiya/ Sakinomiya Shrine - Homepage]{{リンク切れ|date=2024th year 10月}} == location == The shrine is located at: * Daimon 3-18-1, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture, Japan. == Access == The shrine is approximately 1 kilometer north of JR {{ill|Kami-Suwa Station|en|Kami-Suwa Station|WD=Q844049|lt=Kamisuwa Station|1=Kami-Suwa Station}}. == See Also == * {{ill|List of shrines in Suwa City|ja|諏訪市#神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of shrines in Suwa City|1=Suwa, Nagano|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q846338}} * {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}} == References == {{Reflist}}
